notes: Missing in-game sound. To fix it, run winetricks xact: "WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/571530/pfx winetricks xact". For game launch issues force Proton 4.2-x or 3.16-9 Beta. (Caveats: Window mode limited to 1280x720+below. Fullscreen/borderless defaults to desktop resolution e.g. 1920x1080.) Game runs great at stable 60fps.
